## dropdownSpinner() function

Create a dropdown widget with multiple selectable options, which can be navigated through with \[+\] and \[-\] buttons from a spinner widget.

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare function dropdownSpinner(params: DropdownSpinnerParams & FlexiblePosition): WidgetCreator<FlexiblePosition>;
```
